content: Hi! I am Ayush a CS Junior at Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee. I am currently interseted in Deep learning and am also exploring a lot of other stuff ranging from robotics, finance to pyschology. At IIT Roorkee, I am also a core member of a deep learning research centric discussion group called the Vision and Language Group
